rationale: Automated review summary only; no actionable code request.
Manual-auth secret slugs now include a stable SHA-256 digest of the original profile_id, preventing normalized profile ID collisions.
Manual auth commit now merges Anthropic secret_refs, clear_env_keys, and env_template entries into existing profile configuration.
Claude manual token validation now reuses a cached httpx.AsyncClient instead of constructing one per request.
auth_readiness and authreadiness are now treated as non-secret metadata keys by payload redaction.
Automated review body summarizing the actionable line comments; no separate code request.
